description.unified: Deals Magic Damage 7 times to nearby enemies in a circular area around the user. Then deals Magic Damage to enemies in a frontal area and [inflicts Down for 1.5sec -> knocks them down for 1.8 sec].

Deals Magic Damage to all enemies and stuns them for [0.5sec -> 1.2 sec]. Upon casting, enters [Arcane Crystal Awakening] for 10 sec, increasing the ATK Spd of all allies by [35% -> 300]. While active, releases a shockwave every [1.3sec -> 1.4 sec], dealing Magic Damage to nearby enemies [ (added) and stunning them for 0.6 sec].

Summons an Arcane Crystal to deal Magic Damage to enemies in a frontal straight-line area, then causes an explosion shortly afterward that deals additional Magic Damage. Inflicts [Arcane Crystal Curse] on enemies for 5 sec, reducing their ATK Spd by [10% -> 200]. When attacking enemies under [Arcane Crystal Curse], applies 1 stack of [Arcane Crystal Energy]. [Arcane Crystal Curse] explodes after 5 sec, dealing Magic Damage plus an additional 43% of ATK per stack of [Arcane Crystal Energy].
Changes base Mana Recovery per sec to 150, increases Crit Chance by [250 -> 200], and increases the duration of CCs that all allies inflict on Bosses by [15% -> 30%].

II.unified: Increases [Crit Chance by 50 -> ATK Boost by 10%].

III.unified: Increases [Crit Chance by 75 -> ATK Boost by 15%].

IV.unified: Increases [Crit Chance by 125 -> ATK Boost by 25%].

dark.unified: If there is only 1 enemy, DMG is increased by [ (removed) 15% (up to 10 stacks) -> 100%].

light.unified: Increases Mana Cost by 1000 and [increases duration by 4 sec -> reduces Cooldown by 6 sec].

dark.unified: While under [Arcane Crystal Awakening], [increases ATK SPD by an additional 35% -> damage dealt to non-hero enemies is increased by 20%].

light.unified: [ (removed) [Arcane Crystal Curse] additionally reduces ATK SPD by 10% -> Increases Mana Cost by 1000 and reduces Cooldown by 6 sec].
At the start of battle, increases damage dealt to non-hero enemies by [65% for 10 sec -> 25% for 20 sec].

description.unified: [Slash, Blade of Judgment!] Increases DMG by {0}% and reduces Mana Cost by [1000 -> 1].

[Disperse, Crystal Haze!] Increases [ (removed) ATK SPD of all allies by 10% and increases] ATK Spd by an additional {0} and increases DEF Penetration of all allies by [ (removed) {0} -> 250 for the duration of Skill].

Increases DMG of [Bloom, Crimson Flower!] by [ (removed) {0}% -> 40%], and upon gaining a stack of [Arcane Crystal Energy], there is a [ (removed) 1 additional stack -> {0}% chance to gain 3 additional stacks].
[End to Evil Deeds!] Increases [Crit DMG by 32% -> Crit Chance by an additional 250] and the duration of CC increase effect by [ (removed) {0}% -> an additional {0}%].

dark.unified: Increases Crit DMG by [30% -> 40%] and DEF Penetration by 150. This effect increases by 2 times after Kirze attacks the enemy 100 times.
